Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Yerin's Blood Shadow]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin possesses a Blood Shadow.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin has a Blood Shadow that resides inside her soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow is a crimson shade in her general shape that extends from her spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow has six sword-arms sticking out from its shoulders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow wears red robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow holds a pink-bladed sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow uses a Goldsign.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin's Blood Shadow has Goldsigns and can laugh.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin has a Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin possesses a technique called Blood Shadow.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
